pr.title: Record: Depth-Recurrent UT + Rank-1 LoRA Per-Iteration Adaptation — val_bpb 1.3342

output.summary: Depth-recurrent Universal Transformer uses loop-wise rank-1 LoRA vectors on AdamW plus Output-LN and Birkhoff mixing for stable per-iteration adaptation.
techniques: Depth-recurrent UT with shared loops and per-iteration rank-1 LoRA
AdamW-updated rank-1 LoRA vectors to avoid Muon scaling asymmetry
Output-LN, Birkhoff mixing, and noisy INT6 QAT stabilize recurrence
